display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AGENTS.md
Repo root — canonical cross-host policy
Read by all agents on all hosts

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
odylith/AGENTS.md
Odylith subtree — scoped canonical policy

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Subtree AGENTS.md files
e.g. odylith/radar/source/AGENTS.md
Override parent for their scope

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLAUDE.md
Repo root — Claude Code entrypoint shim
Defers to AGENTS.md as canonical truth

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
odylith/CLAUDE.md
Odylith subtree — Claude Code entrypoint shim
Defers to odylith/AGENTS.md as canonical truth

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Subtree CLAUDE.md files
e.g. odylith/radar/source/CLAUDE.md
Scoped shims for deeper Claude Code entry

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Repo-owned truth
AGENTS.md files authored by maintainers
Never overwritten by Odylith install or repair

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Product-managed companions
CLAUDE.md files materialized by odylith install/repair
Managed Odylith surface — not repo-owned guidance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Accept AGENTS.md OR CLAUDE.md
as the repo-root guidance marker
Either alone is sufficient to bootstrap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bootstrap grounding and consumer profile
from whichever root marker is present

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
is_guidance_file()
returns true for AGENTS.md AND CLAUDE.md
Both protected from ordinary-doc treatment
